subject: summary of supply offers in california

emails.subject: Summary of Supply Offers in California
emails.subject_base: Summary of Supply Offers in California
emails.body: Summary of Supply Offers in California Jim: Attached is a fairly distilled summary of the projects Enron's offered to the utilities, DWR and the ISO over the past 9-12 months, or so. With respect to the power contracts offered to the IOUs, only the offers accepted by PG&E and Edison are included---the desk doesn't keep records of offers rejected, only offers accepted. However, I'm fairly confident that I can dig deeper and get more info on the other power deals offered to Edison, PG&E and SDG&E if folks would like that information. Just let me know. Prices are included for the offers that had prices attached when submitted. Best, Jeff
